decisions.description: PRDv1 superseded by PRDv2. All conflicting claims resolved in favour of v2.
conflicts: POST /api/orders: v1 says 200, v2 says 201 + Location header
GET /api/orders: v1 has no pagination, v2 introduces cursor pagination with { items, nextCursor }
Authentication: v1 uses session cookies, v2 uses Bearer JWT

decisions.description: ADR 0001 confirms Bearer JWT. Auto-merged with PRDv2 auth section — no conflict.
ADR 0002 confirms error envelope shape. Auto-merged with PRDv2 — no conflict.
